title: TFC Aged Alcohol
description: Add aged alcohols with various effects to TFC.
body:
This mod adds aged alcohols with various effects to TFC.

The ageing process takes 24 in-game days. 


Aged Beer: Absorption II

Aged Cider: Speed

Aged Rum: Speed II

Aged Sake: Resistance

Aged Vodka: Resistance II

Aged Corn Whiskey: Haste

Aged Rye Whiskey: Haste

Aged Whiskey: Haste II

Aged Mead: Regeneration (if Firmalife is installed)


Effects can be tweaked via datapacks.
